entries.source: Public guest modes give anyone a useful place to start, while school and partner deployments can adapt the experience for local needs.
entries.value: Mga pampublikong guest mode give anyone isang kapaki-pakinabang place magsimula, habang paaralan at partner deployments Maaari bang umangkop ang experience para sa local kailangan.

entries.source: Public guest-mode URLs exist so learners can land directly in useful learning modes from search, social links, schools, and AI answer engines.
entries.value: Pampubliko guest-mode URLs exist kaya mga mag-aaral Maaari bang land directly sa kapaki-pakinabang mga pag-aaral mode mula sa search, social mga link, mga paaralan, at Mga engine ng sagot ng AI.

entries.source: Public learning pages are crawlable; private saved chats, accounts, admin tools, and user data are not discovery surfaces.
entries.value: Crawlable ang mga pampublikong page sa pag-aaral; hindi discovery surfaces ang pribadong naka-save na chat, account, admin tool, at data ng user.

entries.source: Public learning should be discoverable without making private chats public.
entries.value: Pampubliko pag-aaral dapat maging discoverable nang walang paggawa pribado chats pampubliko.

entries.source: Public modes are tuned for explanations, Socratic questions, hints, step checks, quizzes, and review.
entries.value: Pampubliko mga mode ay tuned para sa mga paliwanag, Socratic mga tanong, mga hint, hakbang sinusuri, mga quiz, at repaso.

entries.source: Public pages are open to search and AI retrieval crawlers, while admin tools, API routes, reset flows, and private utilities are disallowed.
entries.value: Mga pampublikong pahina ay Buksan sa search at AI retrieval crawlers, habang admin mga tool, API mga ruta, reset flows, at pribado utilities ay disallowed.

entries.source: Public pages for subjects, private chats for learners.
entries.value: Mga pampublikong pahina para sa mga paksa, pribado chats para sa mga mag-aaral.

entries.source: Public pages show product behavior, not private student work.
entries.value: Mga pampublikong pahina show produkto behavior, hindi pribado estudyante work.

entries.source: Public pages, topic chats, learning paths, blog guides, and authority pages are intended to be discoverable.
entries.value: Mga pampublikong pahina, paksa chats, mga landas sa pag-aaral, mga blog gabay, at authority mga pahina ay intended sa maging discoverable.

entries.source: Public topic URLs let searches such as AI Socratic tutor, AI homework coach, AI flashcard builder, and talk to historical figures AI land directly in the matching mode.

entries.source: Questions expose assumptions and gaps, so the learner builds the answer instead of copying one.

entries.source: Questions make you expose your own model of the topic, which is where confusion, false confidence, and missing prerequisites usually show up.
entries.value: Pinapalabas ng mga tanong ang sarili mong model ng paksa, kung saan karaniwang lumilitaw ang pagkalito, maling kumpiyansa, at kulang na prerequisite.

entries.source: Questions must have 4 answer options, one correct answer, concise explanations, and no answer leakage.
entries.value: Mga tanong dapat mayroon 4 sagot mga opsyon, isa correct sagot, maikli mga paliwanag, at no sagot leakage.

entries.source: Questions reveal the shape of confusion. A learner might know a formula but not when to use it. They might remember a historical fact but not understand the cause. They might have a strong opinion but weak evidence.
entries.value: Mga tanong reveal ang shape ng confusion. Isang mag-aaral might alam isang formula pero hindi kapag gamitin ito. Sila might Tandaan isang pangkasaysayan katotohanan pero hindi understand ang cause. Sila might mayroon isang malakas opinion pero mahina ebidensya.

entries.value: Mga paaralan Maaari bang suriin pampubliko mga mode una, pagkatapos talakayin iniangkop mga workflow, pagpaplano ng pagiging kumpidensyal, content kailangan, at pinondohang access.

entries.source: Schools can offer white-labelled AI chat experiences tailored to their learners, including NCERT-aligned content and workflows, with usage funded by partner schools or CSR sponsorship.
entries.value: Maaaring mag-alok ang mga paaralan ng white-labelled AI chat experiences na iniakma sa kanilang mga mag-aaral, kabilang ang content at workflow na nakaayon sa NCERT, na pinopondohan ng partner schools o CSR sponsorship.

entries.source: Schools can start by trying the public modes, then move toward a tailored version when they need custom workflows, content alignment, or funded access.
entries.value: Mga paaralan Maaari bang magsimula ng pagsubok ang pampubliko mga mode, pagkatapos lumipat toward isang iniangkop version kapag sila kailangan custom mga workflow, content alignment, o pinondohang access.

entries.source: Schools can test public guest modes first, then use the schools page to explore tailored workflows, confidentiality planning, NCERT-aligned options, and funded access.
entries.value: Mga paaralan Maaari bang Subukan ang mga pampublikong guest mode una, pagkatapos Gamitin ang mga paaralan pahina sa Galugarin ang iniangkop mga workflow, pagpaplano ng pagiging kumpidensyal, Aligned sa NCERT mga opsyon, at pinondohang access.
Science Lab Partner

entries.source: Science Lab Partner AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Plan safe demonstrations, understand variables, predict outcomes, and reason from evidence like a scientist.
entries.value: Science Lab Partner Mode ng pag-aaral gamit ang AI ay isang nakapokus way gamitin AI para sa pag-aaral instead ng pasibo sagot koleksyon. Ang mode ay ginawa sa paligid ng isang tiyak gawain: Magplano ng ligtas demonstrations, understand variables, predict outcomes, at dahilan mula sa ebidensya like isang scientist.

entries.source: Science Lab Partner AI Learning Mode: practical guide
entries.value: Science Lab Partner Mode ng pag-aaral gamit ang AI: praktikal gabay

entries.source: Science Lab Partner prompts and study loop
entries.value: Science Lab Partner mga prompt at loop sa pag-aaral
AI tutor sa science

entries.source: Search engines see pages. Learners need sequences. These paths connect the public modes into practical study loops for understanding, homework, exam prep, and exploration.
entries.value: Nakikita ng search engines ang mga page. Kailangan ng mga mag-aaral ang mga sequence. Ikinokonekta ng mga path na ito ang mga pampublikong mode sa praktikal na study loop para sa pag-unawa, takdang-aralin, paghahanda sa exam, at paggalugad.
search intent ng user
Search landing mga pahina

entries.source: Search pages, AI answer engines, and learners all get the same promise: public, useful, canonical entrypoints that open directly inside the learning experience.
entries.value: Mga search pahina, Mga engine ng sagot ng AI, at mga mag-aaral lahat get ang same promise: pampubliko, kapaki-pakinabang, canonical entrypoints na Buksan directly inside ang karanasan sa pag-aaral.
